query: flash photograph harsh fluorescent shadow uneven lighting
message: anti-aesthetic / color_and_tone / color_inconsistency — flash + ambient mixed lighting, harsh uneven exposure

response.objective_caption: A close-up indoor portrait of a person with shoulder-length dark auburn hair wearing hoop earrings and a dark top, positioned against a pale wall. The person is turned slightly toward the camera with pursed lips.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A close-up indoor portrait of a person with shoulder-length dark auburn hair wearing hoop earrings and a dark top, exhibiting amateur snapshot energy with an awkward crop at the top of the head. A strong yellow-orange sickly cast unnaturally tints the skin and environment, while severe overexposure on the left side of the frame blows out the background into a featureless bright area, creating an unpolished, lo-fi aesthetic.
